metadata.description: Customer-facing POC skills for Treasure AI Studio (agent.eu01.treasure.ai). Built for the AI POC framework, Weeks 4–6 skill build phase. All skills are designed to run in Treasure AI Studio (no hooks, no filesystem writes, inline tracking via Step 0).

plugins.name: uc-data-lineage
plugins.description: Customer-facing pipeline lineage tracing from raw landing to parent segment.

plugins.name: uc-data-quality-monitor
plugins.description: CDP data health monitoring — fill rate, row counts, and ID stitching coverage.

plugins.name: uc-parent-segment-overview
plugins.description: High-level overview of parent segment health, freshness, and activation summaries.

plugins.name: skill-usage-tracker
plugins.description: Automated skill usage tracking and session telemetry for Treasure AI Studio.

plugins.name: dash-journey-performance
plugins.description: Journey conversion funnel, node performance, touchpoint engagement, and conversion trend.

plugins.name: dash-unique-customer-view
plugins.description: 360-degree customer profile dashboard covering identity, attributes, behaviors, and RFM.

plugins.name: uc-campaign-analysis
plugins.description: Conversational campaign performance analysis with ROAS, CTR, and time-to-answer benchmarks.

plugins.name: uc-campaign-brief-generator
plugins.description: Structured, agency-ready campaign brief generator with TD Audience Studio segment recommendations.

plugins.name: uc-persona-generation
plugins.description: Data-driven customer persona generation based on actual behavioral clusters in Treasure Data.
